channel.title: GitHub Vim script Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Vim script in GitHub

item.title: neovim/neovim
item.description: Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability

item.title: junegunn/vim-plug
item.description: 🌺 Minimalist Vim Plugin Manager

item.title: vim/vim
item.description: The official Vim repository

item.title: neoclide/coc.nvim
item.description: Nodejs extension host for vim & neovim, load extensions like VSCode and host language servers.

item.title: morhetz/gruvbox
item.description: Retro groove color scheme for Vim

item.title: craftzdog/dotfiles-public
item.description: My personal dotfiles

item.title: puremourning/vimspector
item.description: vimspector - A multi-language debugging system for Vim

item.title: sbdchd/neoformat
item.description: ✨ A (Neo)vim plugin for formatting code.

item.title: preservim/nerdcommenter
item.description: Vim plugin for intensely nerdy commenting powers

item.title: dense-analysis/ale
item.description: Check syntax in Vim asynchronously and fix files, with Language Server Protocol (LSP) support

item.title: ryanoasis/vim-devicons
item.description: Adds file type icons to Vim plugins such as: NERDTree, vim-airline, CtrlP, unite, Denite, lightline, vim-startify and many more

item.title: tpope/vim-eunuch
item.description: eunuch.vim: Helpers for UNIX

item.title: tpope/vim-fugitive
item.description: fugitive.vim: A Git wrapper so awesome, it should be illegal

item.title: SpaceVim/SpaceVim
item.description: A community-driven modular vim distribution - The ultimate vim configuration

item.title: preservim/nerdtree
item.description: A tree explorer plugin for vim.

item.title: liuchengxu/vim-which-key
item.description: 🌷 Vim plugin that shows keybindings in popup

item.title: itchyny/lightline.vim
item.description: A light and configurable statusline/tabline plugin for Vim

item.title: hrsh7th/vim-vsnip
item.description: Snippet plugin for vim/nvim that supports LSP/VSCode's snippet format.

item.title: glepnir/dashboard-nvim
item.description: vim dashboard

item.title: mashirozx/Pixiv-Nginx
item.description: P站（Pixiv）的正确打开方式

item.title: psliwka/vim-smoothie
item.description: Smooth scrolling for Vim done right🥤

item.title: RRethy/vim-hexokinase
item.description: hexokinase.vim - (Neo)Vim plugin for asynchronously displaying the colours in the file (#rrggbb, #rgb, rgb(a)? functions, hsl(a)? functions, web colours, custom patterns)

item.title: mhinz/vim-startify
item.description: 🔗 The fancy start screen for Vim.

item.title: sainnhe/everforest
item.description: 🌲 Comfortable & Pleasant Color Scheme for Vim

item.title: andymass/vim-matchup
item.description: vim match-up: even better % 👊 navigate and highlight matching words 👊 modern matchit and matchparen replacement
